Welcome to htmlx

This is a test document for the HTML to Markdown converter.

Features

  • Convert HTML to clean markdown
  • Preserve semantic structure
  • Support for:
    • Headings
    • Lists
    • Links

Code Example

Here's some code:


def hello():
    print("Hello, World!")

Links

Visit the GitHub repository for more information.

Table

Feature Status
Basic conversion Working
Advanced features In progress
